name: @eetr/agent-streemr-monorepo
description: Monorepo for @eetr/agent-streemr — reusable Socket.io + LangChain agent plumbing

scripts.dev:sample: concurrently -n agent,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build:sample: npm run build -w agent-streemr && npm run build -w agent-streemr-react && npm run build -w agent-streemr-sample/agent && npm run build -w agent-streemr-sample/client
